_comment: Antipattern definitions. Each regex is a JS RegExp source (double-escaped for JSON). Thresholds: activate at >=3 occurrences total; deactivate after >=5 consecutive clean turns. State lives in ~/.claude/socratic/antipatterns.json.

antipatterns.name: var declaration
antipatterns.fix: Prefer const; use let only when reassignment is required.

antipatterns.name: Unhandled promise (.then without .catch)
antipatterns.fix: Chain .catch() or use try/catch with async/await.

antipatterns.name: Mutable default argument
antipatterns.fix: Use None as default; create the list/dict inside the function body.

antipatterns.name: Bare except
antipatterns.fix: Catch specific exception types (e.g., except ValueError:).
